title: cola bilenguensis
intro: Cola bilenguensis, also known as the "Bilengu cola" or "Bilengu nut", is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is traditionally used in medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties, which can help alleviate headaches, fever, and body aches. The medicinal properties of Cola bilenguensis are attributed to its alkaloids, including cola alcaloide, which provide various health benefits such as reducing pain, improving digestion, and boosting energy levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tonics, and is sometimes combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects.
